cover.headline:
The POS for
operators who care
about their numbers.
cover.subtitle: An offline-first point-of-sale system engineered for arithmetic correctness. Built with accountant-grade shift rigor, true write-ahead offline sync, and advanced menu engineering logic—for the operators running serious food & beverage.

01.title: True Offline Resilience
01.body: We don't use fragile caching. The iPad utilizes a secure write-ahead queue to store orders, cash movements, and shift opens locally. When the internet comes back, it syncs flawlessly without double-charging or lost sales.

02.title: Built-In Barista Training
02.lede: Quality control baked into the till.
02.body: Recipes dictate the workflow. The system guides baristas step-by-step, automatically adjusting stock (like swapping oat milk for whole milk without double-counting) and ensuring perfect consistency across every branch, every time.

03.title: Algorithmic Menu Advisor
03.body: More than just sales reports. Our engine uses proven menu engineering math to score every drink on velocity and margin, offering mathematically defendable 'Lift, Hold, or Soften' price suggestions to maximize your profit.

04.title: Direct Support & Custom Logic
04.lede: A partnership, not a vendor roadmap.
04.body: You get a direct line to the creator. Need custom business logic built for your unique operation? It gets built on request, exactly how you need it. No waiting months for generic feature updates.

problem.eyebrow: Chapter 2 · The state of the art
problem.title: What today's POS gets wrong.

01.title: Treating offline as a failure.
01.body: Most modern systems treat offline as a total failure mode, leaving you stranded. The shop in Maadi shouldn't stop making money because the cell tower went down.

02.title: Poor local support by default.
02.body: Arabic timestamps, dual-brand printer support (Star & Epson), and right-to-left interfaces aren't optional toggles—they need to be native.

03.title: Hiding your own numbers.
03.body: Want yesterday's revenue filtered by branch, formatted cleanly in Excel with SUM formulas? Most systems make you file a ticket or wait for a morning email.

04.title: Operating without a ledger.
04.body: A POS that lets you ring sales without forcing the cash counts to reconcile is just an iPad calculator. Not a real accounting tool.

tellerHero.title:
Where the operation
meets the customer.
tellerHero.caption: The Sufrix teller — iPad, offline-first.

tellerDetail.title:
Built for speed
of service.
tellerDetail.body: Orders ring up in seconds. Modifiers are handled fluidly. First-class support for both Star and Epson printers without wonky drivers. Every action is saved instantly to the iPad first, then syncs backwards to the operation.

01.title: Split Payments
01.body: Cash, visa, and customer credit—with granular tipping per tender—handled in one pane.

02.title: Strict Modifiers
02.body: Modifiers are hard-linked to the recipe, preventing free-text chaos and protecting inventory.

03.title: Blind Drops
03.body: Mandatory cash counting at shift open and close, flagging discrepancies before the drawer locks.

featureMixedCheckout.title:
Flexible checkout
in one screen.
featureMixedCheckout.body: Customers don't always pay with exact change or a single card. Sufrix handles split payments natively—letting you seamlessly split a single order across cash, card, and credit without jumping through menus.

01.title: Split Payments
01.body: Accept any combination of cash, visa, and customer credit seamlessly.

02.title: Exact Change
02.body: Quick-tap buttons for common bill denominations.

03.title: Tip Allocation
03.body: Attribute tips to specific payment methods for accurate reconciliation.

featureCashMovement.title:
Bank-grade cash
movements.
featureCashMovement.body: The cash drawer is treated as a strict ledger. Every time money moves in or out of the drawer for expenses, petty cash, or bank drops, it's explicitly recorded and categorized.

01.title: Petty Cash
01.body: Log mid-shift expenses like ice runs directly on the till.

02.title: Bank Drops
02.body: Securely transfer excess cash out of the drawer.

03.title: Accountability
03.body: Every movement is tagged with the responsible user and a mandatory note.

featureOffline.title:
True Offline
Resilience.
featureOffline.body: When the internet goes down, Sufrix doesn't just cache basic sales and hope for the best. It uses a persistent write-ahead queue to store every transaction, shift open, and cash movement locally.

01.title: Write-Ahead Queue
01.body: A ledger on your iPad that safely queues every action.

02.title: Idempotent Sync
02.body: When the connection returns, it syncs everything exactly once. No double charging.

03.title: Uninterrupted Service
03.body: Your tellers never see a loading spinner waiting for the cloud.

featureRecipe.title:
Built-in
Barista Training.
featureRecipe.body: Sufrix recipes don't just calculate costs—they dictate the workflow. The system shows exact measurements and steps, cutting down training time drastically and ensuring your signature drinks taste the same no matter who is on shift.

01.title: Smart Swaps
01.body: Swap whole milk for oat milk? The system adjusts the cost and deducts the right inventory automatically.

02.title: Quality Control
02.body: Removes the guesswork. Every modifier and instruction is clear.

managementHero.title:
The whole operation,
on one screen.
managementHero.caption: The Sufrix dashboard — available on Desktop and Web.

managementDetail.title: Headquarters in your browser.
managementDetail.body: Today's revenue by branch. Yesterday's recipes by margin. This month's labor by shift. Everything filterable by anything, everything exportable, everything live. Built for speed and reliability.

01.title: Live analytics
01.body: Across every branch, with totals you can break down by specific payment methods or categories.

02.title: Global Inventory
02.body: One central catalog. Stock tracked uniquely per branch, adjusting instantly as recipes are sold.

03.title: Strict Reconciliation
03.body: Complete shift histories with flagged cash differences.

operations.title: An unshakeable ledger.
operations.lede: Sufrix isn't just a way to ring sales. It's the operational backbone, built on a strict, append-only architecture that behaves like an accountant.

01.title: Append-Only History
01.body: Every record has a full history. Who created it, who changed it, when, and from what to what. Nothing is ever truly deleted, only voided and logged.

02.title: Smart Inventory Deductions
02.body: Our engine maps complex modifiers directly to stock. Build a custom order, and the specific substitutions are deducted flawlessly.

03.title: Shift Trust
03.body: Because every penny is tied to the ledger, cash handling stops being an exercise in trust and becomes an exercise in math.

featureExport.title:
Exports you can
actually use.
featureExport.body: We abandoned messy CSV dumps. Sufrix uses a custom generation engine to export beautifully formatted Excel sheets directly from the dashboard, saving your accountant hours of formatting.

01.title: SUM Formulas Included
01.body: Columns automatically sum up. No manual math required.

02.title: Exact Filtering
02.body: Whatever you filter on the screen is exactly what gets exported.

03.title: Instant Delivery
03.body: Generated on the spot. No waiting for a daily scheduled email.

smartPricing.title:
The Menu
Engineer.
smartPricing.lede: Sufrix watches your sales velocity and item margins simultaneously, utilizing proven menu engineering methodologies to surface exact pricing adjustments.

01.title: Velocity × Margin Matrix
01.body: Every item is scored on a dynamic quadrant, updated continuously, separating your stars from your dogs.

02.title: Defendable Math
02.body: Clear lift / hold / soften calls using 95% confidence intervals. No black-box AI guessing.

03.title: Predictive Impact
03.body: See exactly how much revenue a 15 EGP increase on your Iced Latte might generate next week.

builtToFlex.title: Smart Bundles.
builtToFlex.lede: Build complex menus that flex with your day, your branch, or your specific marketing campaign without confusing the kitchen.

01.title: Dynamic Combos
01.body: Group a coffee, pastry, and side into a single discounted bundle. The system still deducts the exact ingredients for each sub-item perfectly.

02.title: Time-Based Promos
02.body: Set pricing rules that activate automatically during morning rushes or slow afternoons.

pricing.title:
Standardized
Packages.
pricing.lede: Transparent pricing designed to scale with your operation. Choose the tier that matches your business, and save by committing long-term.

roadmap.title: On the roadmap.
roadmap.body: Sufrix is constantly evolving. Here is what is currently in active development or coming next to enhance your operations.

01.title: Egyptian eInvoicing
01.body: Native tax integration directly with the Egyptian Tax Authority portal to ensure full, automated compliance without manual data entry.

02.title: Public Ordering Menu
02.body: A customer-facing web endpoint where patrons can build orders and view totals. Future updates will route these directly to the teller with flexible delivery zones—free for inside-mall addressing, dynamic fees for outside radiuses.

03.title: Native Talabat Sink
03.body: A direct API pipeline to Talabat, bringing third-party delivery orders directly into the Sufrix write-ahead queue without needing a secondary tablet.

04.title: Centralized Music Control
04.body: Control and synchronize the ambiance directly from both the teller screen and the dashboard.

backCover.title:
Looking forward to
building together.
backCover.body: Sufrix isn't just software looking for a customer; it's an operational partnership. We're ready to deploy our system into your branches, customize the logic to your exact needs, and help you scale securely. Standard installs ship with everything here, but we build new screens, fields, and integrations on request.

cta.title: Ready to upgrade your operations?
cta.subtitle: Sufrix is built to flex with your business. Contact our creator today to get started.
cta.creator: Creator

onboarding.title: Set up your restaurant

welcome.title: Welcome to Sufrix
welcome.description: Let's get your restaurant set up. A few quick steps and you're ready to take orders.
welcome.pickingUp: Picking up where you left off — some steps are already done.

branch.title: Create your first branch
branch.description: A branch is a physical location — every shift, order and stock count lives under one.
branch.doneHint: Branch created — you can add more locations any time.
branch.emptyDescription: Add your first location to unlock shifts and orders.

payments.title: How do customers pay?
payments.description: These methods are already on — confirm them and switch off anything you don't take.
payments.noneActive: At least one active payment method is needed before you can finish setup.

menu.title: Build your menu
menu.description: Create at least one category and one item — you can fill in the rest later.

costs.title: Ingredient costs (recommended)
costs.description: Add ingredient costs and Sufrix computes profit per item — margins, food cost % and your menu's stars.
costs.emptyHint: Add your first ingredient with its cost per unit to start tracking profit.

addons.title: Addons & extras
addons.description: Extra shots, toppings, sides — anything customers add onto an item.
addons.emptyDescription: Optional — you can add these any time from the menu screen.

team.title: Invite your team
team.description: Add tellers and managers so they can open shifts and ring up orders.
team.emptyDescription: Optional — invite your team now or later from the Users screen.

review.title: Review & finish
review.description: Here's everything you've set up. Optional steps can wait — finish whenever you're ready.

checklist.title: Finish setting up
checklist.firstOrderHint: Open a shift on the iPad and ring up your first order

onboarding.lockedHint: Complete the required steps to enter the dashboard

menuEngineering.title: Menu Engineering
menuEngineering.subtitle: Profit vs popularity for every item — find your stars and your dead weight
menuEngineering.emptyHint: Pick a different period or branch from the scope bar above.
menuEngineering.clearMissingFilter: Showing only rows missing cost — clear
